samples.title: Invoice with due date
samples.text:
Invoice INV-1048
Bill to: Northstar Logistics
Amount due: $2,450.00
Due date: June 15, 2026
Payment terms: Net 30
samples.reason: Contains an invoice number, amount due, due date, and payment terms.

samples.title: Office supply invoice
samples.text:
Acme Office Supply
Invoice number: AOS-88912
Subtotal: $718.40
Sales tax: $57.47
Total balance due: $775.87
samples.reason: Contains supplier name, invoice number, subtotal, tax, and total balance due.

samples.title: Services invoice
samples.text:
Professional Services Invoice
Client: Harbor Clinic
Line item: May consulting retainer
Invoice date: May 31, 2026
Please remit $3,000 by July 1, 2026.
samples.reason: Identifies itself as an invoice and includes client, line item, invoice date, amount, and remittance date.

samples.title: Partial payment invoice
samples.text:
Receipt and Invoice
Order ID: MKT-55201
Items: signage package, install labor
Total: $1,284.10
Outstanding amount: $642.05
samples.reason: Shows an order, billed items, total, and outstanding amount to be paid.

samples.title: Maintenance invoice
samples.text:
Invoice from Redwood Maintenance
Service period: April 2026
Invoice #: RM-2026-041
Balance due: $498.00
Make checks payable to Redwood Maintenance.
samples.reason: Includes vendor, service period, invoice number, balance due, and payment instruction.

samples.title: Product operations resume
samples.text:
Jordan Patel
Product Operations Manager
Experience: 6 years in workflow automation and customer operations.
Skills: SQL, stakeholder management, process documentation.
samples.reason: Lists a person, role, experience, and skills as a professional profile.

samples.title: Software engineer resume
samples.text:
Maya Chen
Software Engineer
Work history: Frontend Engineer at Bluefin Labs, 2022-present.
Education: B.S. Computer Science, Rutgers University.
samples.reason: Contains candidate name, job title, work history, and education.

samples.title: Data analyst resume
samples.text:
Resume: Alex Romero
Summary: Data analyst with banking and risk reporting experience.
Tools: Python, Excel, Tableau.
Certifications: Google Data Analytics Certificate.
samples.reason: Explicitly says resume and includes summary, tools, and certifications.

samples.title: Recruiter resume
samples.text:
Priya Shah
Senior Recruiter
Professional experience includes sourcing, interview coordination, and ATS administration.
Education: MBA, Human Resources.
samples.reason: Describes a candidate with professional experience and education.

samples.title: Operations associate resume
samples.text:
Name: Theo Martin
Objective: Operations associate role.
Previous roles: Warehouse coordinator, inventory clerk.
References available upon request.
samples.reason: Includes candidate name, objective, previous roles, and references language.

samples.title: Monthly account summary
samples.text:
Monthly Statement
Account ending in 4421
Opening balance: $4,210.20
Deposits: $1,600.00
Withdrawals: $985.44
Closing balance: $4,824.76
samples.reason: Contains account identifier, deposits, withdrawals, opening balance, and closing balance.

samples.title: Statement period summary
samples.text:
Community Bank
Statement period: April 1-April 30, 2026
Account summary
Beginning balance: $12,004.18
Ending balance: $11,842.03
samples.reason: Uses bank statement language with statement period and beginning/ending balances.

samples.title: Checking account activity
samples.text:
Checking Account Activity
04/03 ACH deposit payroll $2,225.00
04/05 debit card grocery $88.14
04/12 ATM withdrawal $100.00
Available balance: $3,109.55
samples.reason: Shows dated account transactions, deposits, debits, ATM withdrawal, and balance.

samples.title: Savings statement
samples.text:
Savings Statement
Account holder: Morgan Lee
Interest paid year to date: $18.20
Average daily balance: $7,450.67
Statement closing date: May 31, 2026
samples.reason: Contains savings statement details, account holder, interest, average balance, and closing date.

samples.title: Business banking statement
samples.text:
Business Banking Statement
Account ending 9088
Credits this period: $8,900.00
Debits this period: $7,345.22
Service charge: $12.00
samples.reason: Includes business banking statement language with account ending, credits, debits, and service charge.

samples.title: Password reset issue
samples.text:
Subject: Cannot reset my password
Hi support team, the reset link expires immediately after I click it. Can you help me regain access to my account?
samples.reason: Customer is asking support for help with an account access issue.

samples.title: Duplicate billing issue
samples.text:
Subject: Billing question
Hello, I was charged twice for my May subscription. Please review invoice 5542 and refund the duplicate payment.
samples.reason: Customer message requests support review and refund for a billing issue.

samples.title: Upload crash report
samples.text:
Subject: App crashes when uploading files
The dashboard freezes whenever I upload a PDF larger than 5 MB. I am using Chrome on Windows 11.
samples.reason: Reports a product problem with environment details for support troubleshooting.

samples.title: Account owner change request
samples.text:
Subject: Change account owner
Can you transfer workspace ownership from dana@example.com to opslead@example.com? The current owner left our company.
samples.reason: Customer requests an account administration change from support.

samples.title: Feature request email
samples.text:
Subject: Feature request
It would help our team if exported reports included annotation history and reviewer names. Is this planned?
samples.reason: Customer submits a product feature request to the support team.

samples.title: Meeting notes
samples.text:
Meeting notes
Discussed office seating, coffee machine repair, and next Friday's volunteer event.
samples.reason: General meeting notes do not match invoice, resume, bank statement, or support email workflows.

samples.title: Recipe draft
samples.text:
Recipe draft
Combine chickpeas, lemon juice, garlic, olive oil, and tahini. Blend until smooth and adjust salt.
samples.reason: Recipe instructions are unrelated to the learned document workflows.

samples.title: Weather alert
samples.text:
Weather alert
Heavy rain is expected after 4 PM. Outdoor activities should move indoors where possible.
samples.reason: Weather notice does not contain the defining features of any supported workflow.

samples.title: Personal reminder
samples.text:
Short note
Remember to pick up printer paper and call the building manager about the elevator.
samples.reason: Personal reminder text should be treated as outside the learned applicability boundary.

samples.title: Product label
samples.text:
Product label
Organic green tea, 20 sachets. Ingredients: green tea leaves. Store in a cool, dry place.
samples.reason: Product label content is not an invoice, resume, bank statement, or support email.
